top_signals.title: Oil Holds Drop as More Tankers Cross Hormuz After Peace Talks
top_signals.summary: Oil held declines as more tankers openly cross the Strait of Hormuz, with the US and Iran making progress toward ending the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cerebras falls 10% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
top_signals.summary: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Leonardo, Baykar tout in-flight control of Kizilelma drone from a M-346 jet trainer
top_signals.summary: Following an autonomous taxi and take-off, the Kizilelma autonomously linked to the M-346 using “an advanced radio frequency data exchange system."
